creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Thomas Zander from comment #6)
> Thanks for taking maintainership! Committed.
> 
> Just a brief note for future submissions: Your diff did not indicate the
> (necessary, because it is included in the 1.2.6 release already) removal of
> files/patch-Makefile. Probably you did not run 'svn rm' on them.

Thank *you*, Thomas.
Sorry about the svn diff. I *usually* remember to
svn delete/add as necessary, prior to creating the
diff. But apparently forgot. :(

Thanks again!

--Chris
